title: G1 — geometry-derived caps from DXF r0.6 (Z-stack true-scale)
description: First BUILDABLE geometry cap set, extracted from varcap-nodeanalysis-template-r0_6_TMD_layout.dxf via the Z-stack true-scale radii (areas = 6 kept sectors x 30deg annular coverage; gaps/dielectrics read from the dimensioned Z-stack). Replaces the campaign placeholder caps (C1/C2 160/1000, Cx 60/1200, Ca/Cb 100). SCHEMA NOTE: unlike R1-baseline.json (geometry-primary; index.html derives caps via plateCaps()), this preset is consumed by the Python script geom_shuttle_run.py, which has no JS engine, so it carries the RAW caps directly (pF) plus geometry provenance. It is NOT wired into index.html's presetExpectGetters (those five getters are geometry-derived; index.html is untouched/out of scope). Caps inject into the frozen shuttle_core.py via the supported set_device_caps() hook (C1/C2/Ca/Cb/Cpar) and Params.cx_min/cx_max (Cx3/Cx4).

c1min.why: C1 variable floor (pF): hub-ring annulus r71-95, continuous always-overlapping; air er 1.0, gap 7.0 mm, band 95-387.

c1max.why: C1 variable peak (pF): active band r95-387, 6 kept sectors x 30deg; air, gap 7.0 mm.

c2min.why: C2 floor = C1 (one rotor-driven C(theta); antiphase lives in the stator plates, 30deg apart).

c2max.why: C2 peak = C1; band r95-387, air, gap 7.0 mm.

cx3min.why: Cx3 island collapsed (pF): ~fringe, no dedicated ring on the pickups; air, gap 7.6 mm, band r75-232.

cx3max.why: Cx3 island plateau (pF): pickup overlap, 6 sectors x 30deg; air, gap 7.6 mm.

cx4min.why: Cx4 = Cx3 (same 30deg family, no deliberate island offset). Fringe floor.

ca.why: Ca fixed transfer cap (pF): mica er 5.4, gap 4.5 mm, band r110-175.

cb.why: Cb = Ca (symmetric, as the doubler requires; per TMD section 8 confirm the DXF Z-stack shows only the Ca side shrunk — assume symmetric).

cR.why: C_R rotor-rotor (pF): mica, gap 12.0 mm, band r71-491. RECORD ONLY: the ideal/galvanic pump collapses the 5-6 rail to ground (C_R shorted), so it does not feed z (shuttle_core.py modelling tier; brief G0).

cpar.why: per-node stray to ground (pF), standard; equals the solver default CPAR.

provenance.method: Z-stack true-scale radii (the only true-scale radial reference; part/concentric views are frame-scaled and must not be used for absolute dimensions). Areas = 6 kept sectors x 30deg annular coverage; gaps and dielectrics read directly from the dimensioned Z-stack.
provenance.phase: Rotor faces aligned (ND5 == ND6 angularly) -> coherent C_R; C1 and C2 are one rotor-driven C(theta) 30deg apart (antiphase in the stator, not the rotor). Cx3/Cx4 at the same 30deg family with no deliberate offset, so the firing-order lag is NOT pre-encoded as an island offset (see geom_shuttle_run G3).

c1min.why: locked input; consumer asserts loaded == expect on load.

cR.why: locked input (record only; not consumed by the pump).

anchorZ.why: G0 degenerate-limit anchor (Ca/Cb -> large, C_R shorted, shuttles -> ideal diodes) must recover the galvanic baseline at the geometry C1/C2 caps.

placeholderZ.why: campaign placeholder-cap ideal z_shuttle (Z_IDEAL 1.1893791) — the G1 comparison baseline.
